What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A young girl wearing a pink cardigan waves in front of wooden shelves. Purple scissors and a silver craft knife rest on a red cutting board alongside patterned tape. Hands hold a rectangular object wrapped in floral duct tape over the board. Small paper cutouts appear near the tools during the crafting process.
